narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 4-A (precinct in Huron County) has 523 registered voters, with 71.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
